content:
Of course. Here are the memory aids in the requested JSON format:

```json
{
  "mnemonics": ["USE CASE: Users Specify Every Condition And Scenario Exactly"],
  "keyPoints": ["A use case describes interactions between a user (actor) and a system to achieve a goal.", "The main components are: Actor, System, Goal, and Scenario/Steps.", "Use cases are written from the user's perspective, not a technical one."],
  "commonMistakes": ["Defining system internals instead of user interactions.", "Creating overly complex use cases instead of breaking them down (think "Happy Path" first).", "Forgetting to include alternative flows (e.g., error conditions)."]
}
```
